skills.name: moomoo-news-search
skills.description: Moomoo single-stock news/article/announcement/research retrieval — list only, no interpretation
skills.discovery_hint: Trigger when the user wants a list of news / articles / announcements / research reports (title + time + link) for a specific stock or company, and the message contains both a stock target and an explicit news-intent keyword (news / article / announcement / notice / research report / headline / update). Retrieval only — no interpretation or summarization. Typical must-trigger examples: 'what's the latest news on Tesla', 'any recent Apple announcements', 'NVDA latest news', 'what news about Apple'. SKIP: bare stock mention with no news keyword; user explicitly asks to interpret / analyze / summarize / digest (→ moomoo-stock-digest); community sentiment / bullish-bearish mood (→ moomoo-comment-sentiment).

skills.name: moomoo-stock-digest
skills.description: Moomoo single-stock news interpretation / digest — analysis & summary, not a raw list
skills.discovery_hint: Trigger ONLY when the user uses an explicit interpretation verb — interpret / analyze / summarize / digest / what does this mean / what's the impact / bullish or bearish takeaway — directed at a single stock's news or announcements. Typical must-trigger examples: 'interpret Tesla's latest news for me', 'analyze NVDA's recent news flow', 'summarize Apple's recent announcements'. Hard rule: presence of news-intent nouns alone (news / announcement / update) is NOT enough — an interpretation verb must also be present. SKIP: user only wants to list / retrieve raw news like 'NVDA latest news' or 'what news about Apple' (→ moomoo-news-search); community sentiment / bullish-bearish mood (→ moomoo-comment-sentiment); price/quote checks, anomaly tracking, K-line, holdings, or trade execution; multiple stocks for batch analysis.

skills.name: moomoo-comment-sentiment
skills.description: Moomoo community sentiment — bullish/bearish mood from posts & comments
skills.discovery_hint: Trigger when the user wants to judge or analyze the bullish vs bearish sentiment / mood / community opinion / discussion tone for one or more stocks. The signal here is community posts and comments, not news, not price action. Typical triggers: 'what's the community sentiment on TSLA', 'is retail bullish or bearish on NVDA', 'what are people saying about Apple'. SKIP: user wants a news list (→ moomoo-news-search); user wants news interpretation or impact analysis (→ moomoo-stock-digest); price/quote checks, anomaly tracking, K-line, holdings, or trade execution.

skills.name: moomooapi
skills.discovery_hint: Trigger when the user mentions quotes, prices, K-line, snapshots, order book, trading, positions, account balance, options, placing or canceling orders, stock screening, or other OpenAPI market-data and trading features.

skills.name: install-moomoo-opend
skills.description: Install / upgrade Moomoo OpenD and Python SDK
skills.discovery_hint: Trigger when the user mentions installing, downloading, launching, running, configuring OpenD, or upgrading the moomoo SDK.

skills.name: moomoo-capital-anomaly
skills.discovery_hint: Trigger when the user asks about capital flow, institutional activity, large/small orders, who is buying or selling, broker activity, short selling, or gives a broad anomaly request like 'NVDA anomaly' or 'what's moving TSLA'.

skills.name: moomoo-derivatives-anomaly
skills.discovery_hint: Trigger when the user asks about options, derivatives, warrants, IV, implied volatility, PCR, unusual option activity, put/call sentiment, volatility premium, or gives a broad anomaly request like 'TSLA anomaly'.

skills.name: moomoo-technical-anomaly
skills.discovery_hint: Trigger when the user asks about technical signals, K-line patterns, golden/death cross, overbought/oversold, MACD, RSI, KDJ, or other technical indicator anomalies, or gives a broad anomaly request like 'AAPL any anomalies'.
